arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim could soon add five players to his strongest Manchester United matchday squad
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news after Ruben Amorim provided a positive injury update about several players who are due to return before the end of this season

arts.ttl: Nine players could miss Man United vs Lyon after Ruben Amorim injury update
arts.sum: Manchester United will look to progress to the semi-finals of the Europa League against French opposition Lyon

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Lyon - Europa League
arts.sum: Man Utd's predicted lineup for the second leg of their Europa League quarter-final against Lyon on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Osimhen TRUTH, Raphinha to Man Utd, Nypan SHOCKS Arsenal
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Osimhen TRUTH, Raphinha to Man Utd, Nypan SHOCKS Arsenal Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including the latest on Victor Osimhen, Raphinha and Sverre Nypan .

arts.ttl: 'The King' - Manchester United's Andre Onana Named His Pick For Best-Ever Goalkeeper
arts.sum: Andre Onana has hailed a former World Cup winner as the best-ever goalkeeper to play the game.

arts.ttl: Man Utd prepare to replace Onana with PENALTY MONSTER
arts.sum: Manchester United are preparing a move for Torino penalty save specialist Vanja Milinkovic-Savic . Milinkovic-Savic spent two years on the books at Man Utd a decade ago, but he never made a senior appearance for the Red Devils as he was still a teenager at the time.

arts.ttl: McIlroy can bring Green Jacket to Man Utd - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim wants Rory McIlroy to bring a winning feeling to Old Trafford following his Masters golf triumph.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man Utd 'Want to Sell' Garnacho and Hojlund Alongside Onana
arts.sum: Manchester United are seeking buyers for Alejandro Garnacho and Rasmus Hojlund after also showing a willingness to offload Andre Onana

arts.ttl: Rory McIlroy's stance on Manchester United investment amid $1bn net worth admission
arts.sum: The Masters 2025 winner Rory McIlroy is a boyhood Manchester United supporter who idolised Roy Keane during his childhood

arts.ttl: I hope to see you soon – Ruben Amorim invites Rory McIlroy to Old Trafford
arts.sum: McIlroy previously paraded the Claret Jug at Old Trafford after winning the Open Championship in 2014.
